_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for aiq-research — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk declares.

vars.AIQ_QUERY: <the research question to send to the AI-Q backend>
vars.AIQ_AGENT_TYPE: <optional async agent type, e.g. shallow_researcher (default) or deep researcher>
vars.AIQ_SERVER_URL: <optional AI-Q base URL; defaults to http://localhost:8000>
